title: lastrea obliquata
intro: Lastrea obliquata, also known as the Lateral Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lastrea obliquata include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Lastrea obliquata can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
